items.title: Alabama bill requiring Ten Commandments in schools passes: Democrat warns against ‘romanticizing’ history

items.title: Justin Bieber headlines Coachella with nostalgia-fuelled set
items.dek: The star spent much of the gig singing along to YouTube videos of early hits like Baby and Never say Never.
items.body: The star spent much of the gig singing along to YouTube videos of early hits like Baby and Never say Never.

items.title: Ukraine and Russia accuse each other of hundreds of ceasefire violations
items.dek: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says his nation's forces would respond "symmetrically" to Russian attacks.
